output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY3-007","author":"Jules_84","text":"It honestly feels like we've all been reduced to data points by some algorithm that doesn't care about context. I tried to post a picture of my dog, got flagged instantly, and the support bot just told me to 'report' myself for no reason. It's exhausting trying to explain nuance to a script designed to catch bad actors but accidentally silencing real people.","category":"Normal","correctAction":"Approve","difficulty":"Medium","explanation":"This is a permitted expression of frustration regarding platform mechanics and does not constitute a policy violation.","day":3,"correctEscalationReason":"","acceptableEscalationReasons":[],"allowNeedsReviewEscalation":false,"isStoryPost":false}]}
